name: Pre-Sold Author Package
description: A six-month build that produces a finished book from the client's own voice, plus a launched podcast, an audio voice clone, and the author authority infrastructure to position the book for pre-sales. Application only. Pre-sales depend on execution and market fit and are not guaranteed.

audience.audienceType: Executives, authors, entrepreneurs, and professionals who want a finished book and the author authority infrastructure around it

priceSpecification.description: Paid up front, or split into twelve monthly payments of $3,000 at no extra cost; delivery runs the first six months. If the client takes the Legacy Publishing option, Legacy earns 10% of net book sales as royalty with no upfront fee.

hasOfferCatalog.name: What the Pre-Sold Author Package includes

itemOffered.name: The Book
itemOffered.description: Eight private interviews become a finished manuscript delivered by month three. Publishing option through Legacy Publishing at 10% of net royalties, with cover, interior layout, ARC copies, and retail distribution.

itemOffered.name: The Podcast
itemOffered.description: A launched show, recorded with guests or produced from the client's voice clone, which earns an IMDb Person page through the podcast credit. Setup, branding, hosting, and distribution handled.

itemOffered.name: The Voice Clone
itemOffered.description: An audio voice clone and a voice corpus, both exclusive to this package, used to produce audio in the client's voice and kept by the client.

itemOffered.name: The Authority Build
itemOffered.description: Bio pages, contributor citation surfaces, a Wikidata Person entry, author profiles across major platforms, a full website if needed, podcast tour placements, and a coordinated launch sequence positioning the book for pre-sales.
